documentation.description:
Compression_Method is actually reflecting the way of compressing
data, not only the final compression format called "method" in
Zip specifications.

simple_types.name: Compression_Method
simple_types.code:
type Compression_Method is
  (Store,
   Shrink,
   Reduce_1,
   Reduce_2,
   Reduce_3,
   Reduce_4,
   Deflate_Fixed,
   Deflate_0,
,
,
,
   …,
   Preselection_2);

enumeration_literals.name: LZMA_1
enumeration_literals.description: LZMA with non-default parameters, targeted for specific data types:

enumeration_literals.name: LZMA_2
enumeration_literals.description: LZMA with non-default parameters, targeted for specific data types:

enumeration_literals.name: LZMA_3
enumeration_literals.description:
NB: LZMA_3 can be very slow on large data
LZMA with non-default parameters, targeted for specific data types:

enumeration_literals.name: LZMA_for_PGM
enumeration_literals.description: TBD: photo vs drawing (expect much LZ redundancy in the latter)

enumeration_literals.name: LZMA_for_PPM
enumeration_literals.description: TBD: photo vs drawing (expect much LZ redundancy in the latter)

enumeration_literals.name: LZMA_for_PNG
enumeration_literals.description:
------------------
  Multi-method  --
------------------
    Preselection: select a method depending on hints (type and uncompressed size)

enumeration_literals.name: LZMA_for_GIF
enumeration_literals.description:
------------------
  Multi-method  --
------------------
    Preselection: select a method depending on hints (type and uncompressed size)

enumeration_literals.name: LZMA_for_WAV
enumeration_literals.description:
------------------
  Multi-method  --
------------------
    Preselection: select a method depending on hints (type and uncompressed size)

enumeration_literals.name: LZMA_for_AU
enumeration_literals.description:
------------------
  Multi-method  --
------------------
    Preselection: select a method depending on hints (type and uncompressed size)

enumeration_literals.name: Preselection_1
enumeration_literals.description: Not too slow; selects Deflate_3 or LZMA_2*

enumeration_literals.name: Preselection_2
enumeration_literals.description: Can be very slow on large data; selects Deflate_3, LZMA_2*, LZMA_3* or BZip2.

simple_types.name: Data_Content_Type
simple_types.code:
type Data_Content_Type is
  (neutral,
   source_code,
   text_formatted_text_or_dna,
   text_data,
   JPEG,
   ARW_RW2,
   ORF_CR2,
   Zip_in_Zip,
   …, MP4);

enumeration_literals.name: neutral
enumeration_literals.description: No clue about what kind of data

array_types.name: Method_to_Format_Type
array_types.code: type Method_to_Format_Type is array (Compression_Method) of PKZip_method;

subtypes.name: BZip2_Method
subtypes.code: subtype BZip2_Method is Compression_Method range BZip2_1 .. BZip2_3;

subtypes.name: Deflation_Method
subtypes.code: subtype Deflation_Method is Compression_Method range Deflate_Fixed .. Deflate_R;

subtypes.name: LZMA_Method
subtypes.code: subtype LZMA_Method is Compression_Method range LZMA_0 .. LZMA_for_AU;

subtypes.name: Multi_Method
subtypes.code: subtype Multi_Method is Compression_Method range Preselection_1 .. Preselection_2;

subtypes.name: Preselection_Method
subtypes.code: subtype Preselection_Method is Compression_Method range Preselection_1 .. Preselection_2;

subtypes.name: Reduction_Method
subtypes.code: subtype Reduction_Method is Compression_Method range Reduce_1 .. Reduce_4;

subtypes.name: Single_Method
subtypes.code:
subtype Single_Method is Compression_Method
  range Compression_Method'First .. Compression_Method'Pred (Multi_Method'First);

subtypes.name: Taillaule_Deflation_Method
subtypes.code: subtype Taillaule_Deflation_Method is Compression_Method range Deflate_0 .. Deflation_Method'Last;

subprograms.name: Compress_Data

ignored if input_size_known = False

^ code corresponding to the compression method actually used
